books.title: Trilby
books.author: George du Maurier
books.summary: A young woman captures the hearts of a group of artists before falling under the spell of a strange villain.

books.title: The Secret House
books.author: Edgar Wallace
books.summary: During the course of a murder investigation, the Assistant Commissioner of Police uncovers a blackmail scheme involving a seedy newspaper and members of British high society.

books.title: My Reminiscences
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Autobiographical sketches from the Bengali writer, poet, and artist Rabindranath Tagore.

books.title: Eminent Victorians
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: Four witty and biting biographies of Victorians that take aim at the moral superiority of their subject’s time.

books.title: The Swiss Family Robinson
books.author: Johann David Wyss
books.summary: A Swiss family is shipwrecked on a remote island in the East Indies.

books.title: Gullible’s Travels
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: An exasperated Chicago husband and his status-hungry wife attempt to climb the social ladder in six comic misadventures.

books.title: Love’s Labour’s Lost
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: A king and his men swear to abstain from women, just as four women arrive for a state visit.

books.title: The House of the Wolfings
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: A tribe of Goths must defend their land from a Roman invasion.

books.title: With Fire and Sword
books.author: Henryk Sienkiewicz
books.summary: A Cossack uprising in 17th century Poland threatens the entire Commonwealth.

books.title: The Return
books.author: Walter de la Mare
books.summary: After visiting a graveyard, a man finds his appearance has mysteriously changed.

books.title: Sailing Alone Around the World
books.author: Joshua Slocum
books.summary: A sailor gives his account how he completed the first solo sailing voyage around the world.

books.title: The Secret of Father Brown
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: The fourth set of stories of a Catholic priest who is also an amateur detective.

books.title: Running a Thousand Miles for Freedom
books.author: William Craft
books.summary: The authors escape from slavery by posing as a slaveowner and his slave.

books.title: Short Works
books.author: Epictetus
books.summary: A collection of Epictetus’s short works.

books.title: North of Boston
books.author: Robert Frost
books.summary: A collection of Frost’s poetry.

books.title: Penguin Island
books.author: Anatole France
books.summary: A myopic saint mistakenly baptizes some penguins, ushering in a centuries-spanning satire of French history.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: H. Beam Piper
books.summary: A collection of science fiction stories by H. Beam Piper ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Anthony Trollope
books.summary: A collection of Anthony Trollope’s short stories, ordered by date of first publication.

books.title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
books.author: William James
books.summary: A philospher and psychologist surveys direct religious experiences, including healthy-mindedness, saintliness, conversion and mysticism.

books.title: Three Men in a Boat
books.author: Jerome K. Jerome
books.summary: The humorous travelogue of a boating holiday down the Thames taken by three friends and their dog.
